projects.name: Clean Power Papua New Guinea Array
Agricultural Methane Papua New Guinea Conversion

regulations.description: Technology companies must source at least 40% of credits from renewable energy projects
Technology companies must maintain a portfolio average rating of at least 4.2 stars
Manufacturing companies must source at least 30% from energy efficiency projects
Energy companies must source at least 50% from renewable energy
Agriculture companies must source at least 25% from methane capture projects
Transportation companies must source at least 35% from renewable energy
If technology company spends more than $15000 on renewable energy, then total portfolio must include at least 2 projects with SDG7 alignment
